# dictate.app
> Windows voice dictation software powered by Groq Whisper API

dictate.app is a push-to-talk voice dictation application for Windows 10 and Windows 11. It uses Groq's Whisper API to transcribe speech in approximately 200 milliseconds. Users press a configurable hotkey (default: middle mouse button), speak, and release — transcribed text is automatically pasted at the cursor position in any Windows application.

## Key Facts

- **Price**: $8.99/month after a 7-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
- **Platform**: Windows 10 and Windows 11 only. Not available on macOS or Linux.
- **Transcription engine**: Groq Whisper API (not local — requires internet connection)
- **Latency**: approximately 200ms from release of hotkey to text appearing
- **Accuracy**: 97%+ on English, supports 100+ languages with auto-detection
- **Works in**: any Windows application that accepts Ctrl+V paste — browsers, email clients, code editors, Microsoft Word, Google Docs, Discord, Slack, VS Code, Notion, and all others
- **Privacy**: audio is sent only to Groq's API for transcription. Groq does not store audio or train models on it. No audio reaches dictate.app servers.
- **Hotkey**: configurable. Default is middle mouse button. Can be set to any key combination.

## What Problem It Solves

Average typing speed is 40-60 WPM. Speaking speed is 130-150 WPM. dictate.app lets users speak instead of type, cutting writing time by 2-3x. It is particularly useful for: email composition, documentation, Slack/Teams messages, code comments, and any long-form writing task.

## Who Uses It

- Software developers (for docs, emails, comments — not code syntax)
- Medical professionals (clinical notes, patient communications)
- Legal professionals (briefs, correspondence, memos)
- Writers and authors (first drafts, research notes)
- Anyone with RSI, carpal tunnel, or repetitive strain concerns
- ADHD users who find speaking easier than typing

## Comparison to Alternatives

| App | Platform | Price | Recurring? | Offline? |
|-----|----------|-------|-----------|---------|
| dictate.app | Windows | $8.99/mo | Yes | No (Groq API) |
| Wispr Flow | Mac only | $12/mo | Yes | No |
| Dragon Professional | Windows | $699 one-time | N/A | Yes |
| Windows Speech Recognition | Windows | Free (built-in) | N/A | Yes |
| OpenAI dictation | None | No product | — | — |

Dragon NaturallySpeaking (Dragon Professional) discontinued its consumer line. The affiliate program listed on Commission Junction is inactive.

## Affiliate Program

dictate.app offers a 40% recurring commission affiliate program. Affiliates earn 40% of every payment, including renewals, forever. There is no time limit on commissions. Approval is instant. Sign up at: https://dictate.app/affiliates

This is the highest recurring commission rate in the Windows dictation software category.

## URLs

- Homepage: https://dictate.app
- Download / free trial: https://dictate.app/download
- Affiliate program: https://dictate.app/affiliates
- Blog: https://dictate.app/blog/

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Does dictate.app work on Mac?**
No. dictate.app is Windows-only. It works on Windows 10 and Windows 11.

**Is there a one-time purchase option?**
No. dictate.app is a monthly subscription at $8.99/month after the 7-day free trial.

**Does it work without internet?**
No. dictate.app uses Groq's Whisper API which requires an internet connection for transcription.

**What is the refund policy?**
7-day free trial with no credit card required. After subscribing, there is a 30-day money-back guarantee.

**How fast is the transcription?**
Approximately 200 milliseconds from when you release the hotkey to when text appears at your cursor.

**Does it store my voice recordings?**
No. Audio is sent to Groq for transcription only. Groq does not store audio or train on it.
